arts.ttl: Amad confirms injury as reports suggest Amorim faces midfield crisis
arts.sum: Amad has now confirmed that he will be out with an injury, which reports suggest is with an ankle ligament that could mean he will miss for the rest of the season. Other reports suggest that Amorim will also not be able to call upon his midfield trio of Manuel Ugarte, Kobbie Mainoo and Toby Collyer for the trip to north London.

arts.ttl: Tottenham predicted lineup vs Man Utd - Premier League
arts.sum: Tottenham's predicted starting XI vs Man Utd in the Premier League on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer BOMBSHELL: €150m bid put on the table that will break Pep’s heart
arts.sum: With the Old Trafford side in drastic need of offensive strengthening, Ruben Amorim’s side are ready to make a club-record offer to sign Atletico Madrid forward Julian Alvarez, according to a report from Fichajes . While there is little doubt that a player of Alvarez’s quality would strengthen Man Utd, the rumours of such a signing look out of context in the current situation at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Manchester Utd might have wildcard solution to replace Amad after devastating injury blow
arts.sum: Amad has confirmed a long-term injury in a blow to Man United, with Ruben Amorim needing to find a solution

arts.ttl: Amad Diallo confirms Man United fans' worst fears after injury bombshell as star breaks his silence with 46-word social media message
arts.sum: As Mail Sport exclusively revealed, Diallo was hurt in training this week and is still being assessed, but he is expected to be out for at least two months and may not play again this campaign.

arts.ttl: Mauricio Pochettino uses just one word to describe Mousa Dembele after managing him at Tottenham
arts.sum: Mauricio Pochettino worked with some truly amazing players during his time at Tottenham. Harry Kane was a world-class player at Spurs, Dele Alli produced two...

arts.ttl: Teddy Sheringham says Man Utd must solve major problem - despite player he 'quite likes'
arts.sum: It's been a disappointing star to his Manchester United tenure for boss Ruben Amorim and only four sides have scored fewer goals than the Red Devils in the Premier League this term

arts.ttl: Vital Man United ace “extremely disappointed” and confirms he’s out injured “for some time”
arts.sum: In a shattering blow for both player and club, Man United’s brilliant winger, Amad Diallo, has confirmed that he’ll be out injured for some time. It had already been reported that Kobbie Mainoo was ruled out for weeks, with Manuel Ugarte and Toby Collyer also unlikely to play in the Sunday afternoon match against Tottenham […] The post Vital Man United ace “extremely disappointed” and confirms he’s out injured “for some time” appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Man Utd leave fans furious with awkward Kobbie Mainoo social media post
arts.sum: Manchester United are bracing for an injury crisis after a handful of players picked up injuries head of their Premier League clash against Tottenham on Sunday, including Kobbie Mainoo and Amad Diallo

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim left to regret two ruthless Man Utd decisions after latest blow
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim has suffered a major blow after Amad picked up an ankle injury in training that could see him miss the remainder of the campaign
